'''Yunabana''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who lived during the time when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was reorganized into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], he rescued [[Ferus Olin]], [[Trever Flume]], and Solace after their encounter with [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Malorum]] at [[Ryoo Thule]]'s home. He brought them to [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] to be given sanctuary.
